name: Four Star Rugelach + Cinnamon Twists
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Small curd cottage cheese (4% milkfat)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Bestor DFPF73A
1. Drain cottage cheese in a sieve over a bowl for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally. Reserve 1 cup of the drained cheese for the dough.
2. Mix flour and salt until combined. Scatter butter pieces over the dry ingredients and pulse in short bursts until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add reserved cottage cheese to the mix and pulse until it forms a cohesive ball. Divide into four portions, shape each into flat disks, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate at least 4 hours or freeze up to 1 month.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a baking sheet with foil.
5. In a bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon.
6. Remove one dough disk from the refrigerator. Allow it to rest for 10 minutes before rolling on a lightly floured surface into a 10-inch circle, about 1/8-inch thick.
7. Spread apricot jam very thinly over the dough with a small metal spatula. Sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar mixture, then walnuts and currants.
8. Lightly roll the filling ingredients into the dough using a rolling pin.
9. Cut each rolled pastry into 16 pie-shaped wedges. Arrange point-down on the foil-lined sheet about an inch apart.
10. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown. If the pastries are browning too much from jam oozing out, move them to a clean spot on the sheet. Cool for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
